meta.title: All American Door Company | Your Garage Door Specialist

home.hero_slogan: "Where integrity isn't just a word, it's the foundation of our service."
home.showcase_slide_3_caption: Reliable Service: Repair done right, every time.
home.showcase_description: Witness the quality of craftsmanship and the detail we bring to every installation and repair. This is the **All American Standard**.
home.service_1_description: We respond to your needs with **integrity and promptness**. Expert repairs for springs, cables, and openers, executed with the utmost skill and professionalism.
home.service_2_description: New door installation that stands the test of time. We use **American-sourced, high-quality products** that enhance your home's security and value.
home.service_3_description: Honest, proactive tune-ups and inspections. We believe in preventing problems through **diligent and ethical maintenance**, not just fixing them.
home.whyus_1: **Unwavering Honesty:** We provide transparent pricing and diagnostics. Our word is our bond—no exceptions.
home.whyus_2: **Family Dedication:** We treat your home and safety as if it were our own. Trust is earned through every service call.
home.whyus_3: **Dignity of Labor:** We believe in honest, hard work. Our skilled technicians are trained to execute every job with precision and integrity.
home.whyus_4: **Community Stewardship:** Dedicated to serving our local neighbors with respect, offering support and discounts to those who protect our freedom.
home.products_description: Partnering with manufacturers who share our dedication to quality and American craftsmanship.
home.about_quote: "For over two decades, our mission has been simple: to provide a service that reflects the **foundational strength and enduring quality** of the American spirit."
home.about_p1: All American Door Company has served Southern California since 1999, guided by generational principles of **integrity, accountability, and excellence**. We are not just a business; we are a family dedicated to upholding the highest standards of workmanship for our community.
home.about_p2: We install and service only the **most reliable, high-grade products** to ensure your peace of mind. Our success is rooted in treating every customer with the **respect and sincerity** they deserve.
home.form_error_missing_fields: Please fill out all required fields to send the service request.
home.form_success_message: Email client launched! Please send the drafted email.
home.locations_description: Diligent service across these Southern California Counties:

services_page.hero_slogan: "From the foundation to the finish, we build and repair with integrity and the highest American standards of quality."
services_page.service_1_p: We specialize in installing beautiful, durable garage doors from our trusted American partners. Every install is handled with meticulous attention to detail to ensure decades of reliable operation.
services_page.service_1_li_1: **Custom Door Selection:** Steel, Wood, Aluminum, and Composite options.
services_page.service_1_li_2: **Carriage House & Modern Styles:** Enhancing curb appeal with perfect fitment.
services_page.service_1_li_3: **Safety First:** New track alignment, spring calibration, and full system testing.
services_page.service_2_p: When your door fails, you need fast, honest service. Our technicians are highly trained to diagnose problems accurately and provide transparent, lasting repairs, often on the first visit.
services_page.service_2_li_1: **Broken Spring Replacement:** High-cycle torsion and extension springs.
services_page.service_2_li_3: **Cable, Roller & Track Repair:** Getting your system back on the rails safely.
services_page.service_3_p: Extend the life of your garage door system and prevent costly emergency repairs with our signature tune-up and safety inspection programs. We catch problems before they start.
services_page.service_3_li_1: **25-Point Safety Check:** Comprehensive inspection of all moving parts.
services_page.service_3_li_2: **Lubrication & Adjustment:** Quiet and smooth operation restored.
services_page.service_3_li_3: **Annual Service Plans:** Peace of mind for the whole family, year-round.
services_page.cta_banner_title: Ready for the All American Standard of Service?
services_page.cta_banner_p: Contact us today to schedule your consultation, installation, or emergency repair.

coupons_page.hero_slogan: "Great service doesn't have to break the bank. Find our latest offers here."
coupons_page.coupon_1_desc: Applies to any complete new door installation of $1500 or more. Includes a 1-year warranty on labor.
coupons_page.coupon_1_fine_print: Expires 12/31/2025. Must mention coupon when scheduling service.
coupons_page.coupon_2_desc: Get a complimentary 10-point inspection and opener tune-up when you schedule your critical spring repair service.
coupons_page.coupon_2_fine_print: Valid for torsion or extension spring replacement. Limited time offer.
coupons_page.coupon_3_desc: A standing discount for all active and retired Military personnel, as well as customers aged 65 or older. Thank you for your service.
coupons_page.coupon_3_fine_print: Proof of service/age required. Max discount $500. Cannot be combined with other offers.

gallery_page.hero_slogan: "Showcasing the precision, durability, and beauty of the All American Standard in our local communities."
gallery_page.img_1_desc: Riverside County. Completed with decorative hardware and window inserts.
gallery_page.img_2_desc: Orange County. Focus on energy efficiency and clean lines.
gallery_page.img_3_desc: San Bernardino. Re-cabled and balanced after emergency call.
gallery_page.img_4_desc: Los Angeles County. Maximize curb appeal with natural wood tones.
gallery_page.img_5_desc: Riverside County. Silent and secure LiftMaster installation.
gallery_page.img_6_desc: San Bernardino. Upgrading visual appeal and letting in light.
